eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Piute, UT; at 4:08 PM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 4:08 PM JUL 23, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Piute Co. EM: A fast-moving flood is threatening Junction and Marysvale area and are in READY status. Conditions can change quickly. Prepare to leave, and leave early if you feel unsafe. Residents of Junction and Marysvale should stay alert. Pack an emergency kit with medications, documents, water, and supplies. Make a plan and share it with your family and loved ones. Ready your household and pets, and prepare your vehicle to leave quickly. Leave early if you need extra time
